human_actions_pending.context: Verifies execute-skill orient + consult + 7-step execute + final review on plugin 0.8.9 with the plan-skill output as input. The plan-skill UAT already passed (2 WebSearch + 5 WebFetch).

decisions.decision: Path C2 (descriptive-trigger refinement) chosen over C1 (advisor refusal) and C3 (PreToolUse hook)
decisions.rationale: Anthropic 2026 prompt-engineering doc and prior memory both warn against imperative escalation; descriptive triggers + worked examples + reordering + tightened triggers is the recommended pattern.

decisions.decision: Strip personal CLAUDE.md fetch chain references (markdown.new, url-to-markdown, playwright-cli) from SKILL body
decisions.rationale: Marketplace plugin neutrality. User-level fetch substitutes operate at a different precedence layer; plugin shouldn't enumerate them.

decisions.decision: Treat Stage 1 KCB synthetic-fixture FAIL as historical context, not operative gate verdict
decisions.rationale: Manual UAT on plugin 0.8.9 against realistic Compodoc + Storybook setup prompt produced 7 web tool calls and the highest-quality plan of any version tested. KCB synthetic prompt didn't exercise the rich orient + pre_verified pattern.

decisions.decision: Update 06-VERIFICATION.md to PASS-with-caveat (gate_verdict, status, web_usage_count) and append amendment section
decisions.rationale: Reflects empirical state on plugin 0.8.9 while preserving Stage 1 history for traceability.

next_action: Launch /lz-advisor.execute UAT in ngx-smart-components testbed. Pass the existing plan via @ file mention: '/lz-advisor.execute Implement the plan at @plans/compodoc-storybook-angular-signals.plan.md.'
context_notes: Phase 6 plan-skill UAT successfully closed on plugin 0.8.9. The execute-skill UAT is the next test in the same iteration cycle to verify the full executor-advisor loop on a realistic implementation task. Plan was written by 0.8.9 plan skill with 2 WebSearch + 5 WebFetch + 4 pre_verified blocks; uniquely caught the Compodoc-1.2.1 signal-class gotcha (input() lands in propertiesClass not inputsClass; needs argTypes recategorization). The execute skill should re-verify the plan's pre_verified claims, consult advisor before substantive work, execute the 7 steps with atomic commits, do final review, and complete.

Reordered ranking to web-first + tightened step 2 trigger + worked example + stripped personal-tool refs
uat_iteration_history.result: 2 WebSearch + 5 WebFetch + 4 pre_verified blocks; highest-quality plan
